# Archived GitHub workflow definitions

This directory contains the repository's former GitHub Actions workflow files.
They are deliberately stored outside `.github/workflows` so GitHub cannot execute
them.

Use these files only as references while Azure DevOps is the authoritative CI/CD
surface. To restore GitHub Actions later, move the selected workflow files back to
`.github/workflows/`, re-check secrets and permissions, and update `docs/CI_CD.md`.

Related tracking issue: #18.
